hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB providers into unified onboarding workflows that preserve audit evidence and document every decision from intake through risk-based review.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to track the full history of onboarding cases when provider outputs and reviews remain disconnected. This fragmentation slows review workflows and weakens audit readiness for customer due diligence and regulatory compliance.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider results, reviewer actions, internal rules and audit evidence into one continuous case workflow for clear traceability and streamlined onboarding review.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to approval evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs through risk-based routing, case creation, reviewer decisions and evidence preservation for audit-ready onboarding workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into structured onboarding cases with traceable decisions and preserved evidence for clearer audit trails and operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY gives VASPs a controlled compliance layer that preserves case history and audit-ready evidence while supporting provider orchestration and bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how onboarding decisions link to audit-ready evidence packages

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects KYC, KYB, policies, and provider outputs into structured onboarding workflows and audit-ready case management for compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage onboarding workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates onboarding by linking identity, company and risk checks into decision workflows with risk-based routing, case creation, reviewer actions and approval tracking.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence by recording all provider outputs, case notes, decision logs, and reviewer actions into a secured audit trail for onboarding review and regulatory defense.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYC and KYB providers, connecting their outputs into a centralized workflow without requiring changes to existing provider relationships.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC and KYB tools, connecting their outputs into structured reviews and compliance cases rather than replacing underlying providers.
final_title: Review onboarding case history with SFTY
final_description: See how SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured onboarding cases, evidence and audit-ready decision records.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
